name: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass Brep EU VI Real Estate Fondo De
summary: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass Brep EU VI Real Estate Fondo De is a real estate investment fund focused on the European market. It is managed by Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos and invests in real estate through the BREP EU VI structure.
